name: Drive Shack
about: Drive Shack Orlando is a high-tech golf simulation venue located in Lake Nona, near Orlando International Airport and 20 minutes from downtown. It combines a golf experience with interactive games in an upscale sports bar environment, featuring a full menu of chef-inspired food and drinks. The venue offers climate-controlled hitting bays, a rooftop terrace and lounge, and flexible meeting spaces, making it suitable for both individual play and large group events. The facility is positioned as a premier destination for golf, dining, and social gatherings in the Orlando area.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan technology provides accurate ball and club data
Combines golf simulation with an interactive sports bar and games
Full-service restaurant and bar options available on-site
Upscale atmosphere with climate-controlled bays and a rooftop terrace
Suitable for both practice and social events

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu of chef-inspired food available, including digital access to the core menu
Full bar with a variety of alcoholic beverages available

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor technology for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to bring your own clubs or contact the venue directly to inquire about rental options.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, Drive Shack has a full-service kitchen and bar with chef-inspired food and drinks available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified on the website. Duration can vary depending on the number of players and simulator software used.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Drive Shack is family-friendly and offers a casual atmosphere suitable for kids, along with food options for all ages.
